svg.title: Enterprise RAG full pipeline — 13 sections from RBAC to CLI
svg.desc: Top-to-bottom flowchart showing every function group and how data flows through the system

g.text: OLLAMA_MODEL · EMBEDDING_MODEL · CHROMA_PATH · CHUNK_SIZE · TOP_K · HYBRID_ALPHA
Creates realistic files on first run — skips if .generated marker exists
Split text into 400-word windows with 80-word overlap to preserve cross-sentence context
Returns list of string chunks — each chunk is one unit in the vector store
TF matching, log-norm by doc length
merges semantic + keyword, filters by threshold
Scans 5 keyword banks against the query string — returns matching category list
Builds grounded prompt, calls qwen2.5 (temp=0.05), returns answer + citations
orchestrates above 3, returns answer + citation list
Walks enterprise_data/ → load → chunk → SHA ID → add to ChromaDB
covers all 5 roles + RBAC block cases
